module.name: scatter
module.description: A scatter plot from "x y" pairs (optional point labels), with axes and an optional least-squares trend line (equation shown). For correlations and 2-D data.
module.aiSpec:
A SCATTER PLOT from raw pairs — for correlations, clusters, 2-D data. Block module: one point per line (sections merged): `x y` or `x y label` (also `x, y`). Params: `trend` — true → draw the least-squares regression line and print y = ax + b with r² under the plot (default false), `xlabel` / `ylabel` — axis captions (default empty = no caption), `color` — point color (any CSS color, default var(--accent-color)). Use @funcplot for curves of formulas; @scatter is for data points.
<!-- @scatter trend: true, xlabel: hours, ylabel: score --> 1 52 2 55 3 61 4 70 5 74 <!-- @end -->

param.name: trend
param.label: Trend line
param.desc: Draw the least-squares regression line and show its equation with r²

param.name: xlabel
param.label: X label
param.desc: Caption under the horizontal axis (empty = none)

param.name: ylabel
param.label: Y label
param.desc: Caption beside the vertical axis (empty = none)

param.name: color
param.label: Point color
param.desc: Fill color of the data points

snippet.label: Scatter plot
snippet.text: <!-- @scatter trend: true, xlabel: x, ylabel: y --> 1 52 2 55 3 61 4 70 5 74 <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Points "x y" per line; optional regression line + r².
